scripts.build: bash -n bin/sensors && node --check aggregate.mjs && node --check abstractness.mjs && node --check complexity.mjs && node --check apss_topology.mjs && node --check gate.mjs && node --check cx_gate.mjs && node --check adapters.mjs && node --check sentrux_scan.mjs
scripts.typecheck: bash -n bin/sensors && node --check aggregate.mjs && node --check abstractness.mjs && node --check complexity.mjs && node --check apss_topology.mjs && node --check gate.mjs && node --check cx_gate.mjs && node --check adapters.mjs && node --check sentrux_scan.mjs
scripts.test: bin/sensors --help >/dev/null && node --check aggregate.mjs && node --check abstractness.mjs && node --check complexity.mjs && node --check apss_topology.mjs && node --check gate.mjs && node --check cx_gate.mjs && node --check adapters.mjs && node --check sentrux_scan.mjs && node --test tests/ratchet.test.mjs tests/sentrux.test.mjs tests/complexity.test.mjs tests/cx_gate.test.mjs tests/gate_selfvalidation.test.mjs
scripts.lint: bash -n bin/sensors && node --check aggregate.mjs && node --check abstractness.mjs && node --check complexity.mjs && node --check apss_topology.mjs && node --check gate.mjs && node --check cx_gate.mjs && node --check adapters.mjs && node --check sentrux_scan.mjs
